items.title: IBM: Quantum Hopium
items.description: IBM rallies on quantum computing optimism but lacks bold moves or earnings upgrades, with valuation concerns rising. Find out why IBM stock is a sell.

items.title: Datavault AI (DVLT) Is Up 141.5% After $23M IBM Deal and Governance Changes Has the Bull Case Changed?
items.description: Datavault AI recently entered into a significant agreement to license IBM program offerings for payments totaling over US$23 million and announced multiple equity offerings while amending its bylaws to reduce the shareholder meeting quorum requirement to one-third. This combination of new financing initiatives and governance changes suggests the company is positioning itself for enhanced operational flexibility and potential future transactions.
